Homebrew Formulae

python-gdbm@3.11

Install command:

Python interface to gdbm

https://www.python.org/

License: Python-2.0

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/python-gdbm@3.11.json

Formula code: python-gdbm@3.11.rb on GitHub

Bottle (binary package) installation support provided for:

macOS on
Apple Silicon		 tahoe ✅
sequoia ✅
sonoma ✅
macOS on
Intel		 sonoma ✅
Linux ARM64 ✅
x86_64 ✅

Current versions:

stable ✅ 3.11.15

Other versions:

python-gdbm@3.14 3.14.6 Python interface to gdbm
python-gdbm@3.13 3.13.14 Python interface to gdbm
python-gdbm@3.12 3.12.13 Python interface to gdbm

Depends on:

gdbm 1.26 GNU database manager
python@3.11 3.11.15 Interpreted, interactive, object-oriented programming language
